scripts.build: npm run build -w packages/shared && npm run build -w packages/backend && npm run build -w packages/frontend
scripts.test: npm run test -w packages/backend && npm run test -w packages/frontend
scripts.test:coverage: npm run test:coverage -w packages/backend && npm run test:coverage -w packages/frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w packages/shared && npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/backend/tsconfig.json && npx tsc --noEmit -p packages/frontend/tsconfig.app.json
